user_query: My sister and nephew are joining me on Day 6. What activities would be fun for a kid?

selected_nodes.name: Ripley's Aquarium
selected_nodes.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Ripley's Aquarium is explicitly described as an indoor family attraction with interactive exhibits, touch tanks, and marine life — clearly kid-friendly and suitable as a Day 6 activity.

selected_nodes.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
selected_nodes.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 3 > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
selected_nodes.reasoning: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride is an outdoor, family-oriented activity (ferry ride, bike rental, beaches and gardens) explicitly noted as perfect for families and kids.

selected_nodes.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
selected_nodes.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 3 > Day 6 > Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
selected_nodes.reasoning: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch is a relaxed, family-friendly picnic on Centre Island that complements outdoor activities and is appropriate for a child (family-friendly dining/outdoor break).
